About

Building the future through strategic growth and operational excellence.

As the CEO of Wilson Growth, I specialize in transforming ambitious visions into market-leading realities. With a track record spanning multiple industries, I've helped companies scale from early-stage startups to established market players.

My approach combines data-driven decision making with a deep understanding of human-centered leadership. I believe that sustainable growth comes from building exceptional teams, fostering innovation, and maintaining unwavering focus on delivering value to customers.

Whether it's optimizing operations, securing strategic partnerships, or navigating complex market dynamics, I bring a proven framework for success that has generated over $50M in revenue across portfolio companies.

Journey

Career Timeline

2024

CEO at Wilson Growth

Founded Wilson Growth to help companies achieve exponential growth through strategic consulting and operational support.

2022

VP of Operations

Led operations at a Series B startup, scaling the team from 20 to 80 employees and achieving 300% revenue growth.

2020

Director of Strategy

Developed and executed growth strategies that expanded market presence into 5 new international markets.

2018

Senior Consultant

Advised Fortune 500 companies on digital transformation and operational efficiency initiatives.

2016

Business Analyst

Started career at a leading management consulting firm, building foundational expertise in data analysis and strategy.

Projects

Selected Work

$12M ARR

TechScale Solutions

Led the operational transformation of a B2B SaaS platform, resulting in 400% user growth and successful Series A funding.

SaaSGrowth StrategyOperations
5 Markets

Global Retail Expansion

Developed and executed market entry strategy for a retail brand expanding into European and Asian markets.

InternationalRetailStrategy
50K Users

FinTech Platform Launch

Built and launched a financial technology platform from concept to market, acquiring 50K users in the first 6 months.
